case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. PAULA SARTI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARTI, PAULA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (JUMA BYRD - CCSF) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
TRIAL RESET TO APR-28-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-04-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-14-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. COURT ORDER THIS TO BE THE FINAL CONTINUANCE. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE ARE ALLOWED. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF DEFENDANT HAS NOT BEEN SERVED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-14-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-19-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

ORDER CASE CONTINEUD PER PLAINTIFF. MATTER CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2021 AT 1:30 P.M. FINAL CONTNUANCE. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE ARE ALLOWED. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE IF NO PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
